summary_text: `[scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh)` の確認結果です（編集なし）。 - 対応フラグは `--target <codex|claude|both>` / `--with-optional` / `--manifest <path>` / `--force` / `--dry-run` / `-h|--help` です。([`--target`〜`--help`の定義]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh#L23-L28), [`parse`実装](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh#L45-L86)) - `--dry-run` は「置換/インストール意図」を表示するだけで、実ファイル操作をしません。既存管理済みディレクトリを置換する場合は `DRY-RUN replace <target_dir>`、実インストールは `DRY-RUN install <skill> -> <target_dir>` を出力します。([`DRY_RUN`分岐]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh#L117-L130)) - `--force` がない場合、対象ディレクトリが既存で `MANAGED_MARKER` (`.fugue-managed-local-skill`) が無ければ停止します。エラー文言: `exists and is not managed; refusing partial sync. Use --force after review.` この時点で `--dry-run` でも同様に停止（`copy_skill` の存在チェックの時点で失敗）。([停止条件]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh#L115-L124), [マーカー定義](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh#L15), [書込時のマーカー作成](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh#L133-L137)) - 本番移行実行列（依頼手順に沿う）: 1) バックアップ - `cp -R ~/.codex/skills/x-auto-post-guard ~/.codex/skills/x-auto-post-guard.bak` - `cp -R ~/.codex/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director ~/.codex/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director.bak` - `cp -R ~/.claude/skills/x-auto-post-guard ~/.claude/skills/x-auto-post-guard.bak` - `cp -R ~/.claude/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director ~/.claude/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director.bak` 2) SSOT差分確認（repo正本と現行localの比較） - `diff -u /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md ~/.codex/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md` - `diff -u /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md ~/.codex/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md` - 同様に `~/.claude` 側も確認推奨 3) ドライラン - `scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh --dry-run` 4) 問題なければ本番同期（両runtime） - `scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh --force` 5) 同期後検証 - `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-sync-fugue-local-skills.sh` - `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh` - `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh --skill x-auto` - `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh --skill x-auto-post-guard` - `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh --skill x-auto-thumbnail-art-director`
